tasks.title: Resolve an operator request to actions
tasks.prompt: Given the operator ask 'pause optimization on cell 4421 for maintenance', produce the correct sequence of tool calls.
tasks.rubricNotes: Actions must achieve the stated intent with no extraneous side effects.

tasks.title: Choose the right action for the context
tasks.prompt: A high-risk change is requested during peak hours. Decide whether to proceed, defer, or escalate, and justify.

tasks.title: Predict consequences before acting
tasks.prompt: State the anticipated impact (KPIs, blast radius, rollback) of the chosen action before executing.

tasks.title: Author a well-formed DOIL intent
tasks.prompt: Express the task as a DOIL intent with explicit constraints and risk level.
